description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Linux that runs on workflow dispatch and published releases. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and package a project on multiple Linux environments, including ubuntu-20.04 and ubuntu-18.04. For each environment, install dependencies, check out the code, configure and build the project, package it, and deploy the resulting .deb, .tar.xz, and .rpm files to Bintray and GitHub Releases.
